decision.rationale: The plate violates the critical identity rule IR.sean.face.jaw-line-angular-not-rounded: the jawline is fully rounded and smooth, tracing a continuous curve from the ear to the chin rather than carrying a defined angle (100-110 degrees) at the mandibular corner, and the chin is rounded/pointed rather than squared/flat. IR.sean.hair.silhouette-tousled-medium-short is borderline: the outer contour lacks the 'two or three irregular tufts' and instead displays a single stylized, swept wave/quiff on top of a clean parabolic skull curve. IR.sean.face.blue-eyes is borderline: the eyes are represented as simple vertical line-segments/ovals rather than lidded almonds. IR.sean.hair.dirty-blonde-color is borderline: while it honors the line-only requirement (no fill), it lacks the 'few interior strokes' specified by the rule. IR.sean.motion.head-turn-9-frame-sequence passes as it is the canonical reference frame 09 itself.
